hero.label: LeadScaper Platform
hero.title: 4 Layers
hero.desc: A multi-layer AI platform for automated B2B lead discovery, company and decision-maker enrichment, social monitoring, and personalized outreach generation.

overview.title: Core Concept
overview.desc: Four sequential data-processing layers — from company discovery to social engagement.

1.title: Company Discovery
1.desc: Find all potential target companies that match your criteria.

2.title: Contact & Social Enrichment
2.desc: For each discovered company, collect contacts, social profiles, and public data.

3.title: Analysis & Insight Generation
3.desc: Analyze data to surface trigger keywords, decision makers, and personalized messaging.

4.title: Social Engagement
4.desc: Automated monitoring and audience engagement driven by trigger keywords.

ai-find-customer.desc: Discover companies via AI agents using keywords, industry, and geolocation

github-lead-signals.desc: Find companies by technology stack (GitHub activity signals)

clutch-profile-scraper.desc: Collect companies from a B2B directory

icp-researcher.desc: Define Ideal Customer Profile and search against it

coldreach-scraper.desc: Scrape company websites: contacts, mission, services

lead-generator.desc: Find employee LinkedIn profiles and enrich emails

linkedin-scraper.desc: Collect decision-maker profiles with AI-generated pain points

the-3rd-eye.desc: Aggregate digital footprint across social networks

automated-decision-making-discovery.desc: Identify decision makers (CEO, CTO, Head of X) with contact validation

owasp-social-osint-agent.desc: Analyze text and images from social media; generate reports

company-research-agent-tavily.desc: Deep analysis and PDF/Markdown report generation

agent-x-tuitbot.desc: Keyword monitoring with AI-generated replies pending approval

redsignal.desc: Find warm leads with AI relevance filtering

awesome-n8n-templates.desc: Curated automation templates for social media and monitoring

arch.title: Full Architecture Diagram
arch.desc: How layers, orchestration, and data storage interact.
arch.data: Data Lake & CRM — PostgreSQL / SQLite + HubSpot / Salesforce
